book: Atomic Habits Tiny Changes, Remarkable Results An Easy & Proven Way to Build Good Habits & Break Bad Ones - James Clear.kfx

issues.description: Cover image slightly pixelated at edges
issues.suggestion: Re-render at higher DPI if source allows

issues.description: The decorative dot-pattern graphic at the top of the page renders as faint, low-contrast grey dots that appear slightly blurry/pixelated, potentially due to rasterization resolution
issues.suggestion: Re-render the decorative graphic element at higher DPI or ensure vector source is used during conversion

issues.description: The subtitle 'Tiny Changes, Remarkable Results' is styled in a bold grey serif that visually competes with the author name 'JAMES CLEAR' in terms of visual weight, creating a slight hierarchy ambiguity between author name and tagline
issues.suggestion: Ensure subtitle/tagline is clearly subordinate in weight or size to the book title and author name in the stylesheet

issues.description: Minor text artifacts in copyright notice, likely due to OCR processing
issues.suggestion: Verify source PDF for clean text extraction

issues.description: TOC entries contain HTML anchor tags instead of clean text links
issues.suggestion: Remove HTML tags and ensure proper hyperlink formatting

issues.description: Some TOC entries have incorrect chapter numbers (e.g., '5' instead of '1')
issues.suggestion: Verify chapter numbering consistency in source

issues.description: Severe text corruption: 'N THE FINAL day...' missing initial 'O' in 'On'
issues.suggestion: Re-extract text from source PDF to fix encoding/OCR errors

issues.description: Garbled text: 'O' appears as standalone character, likely a page break artifact
issues.suggestion: Check for proper paragraph handling at page boundaries

issues.description: Inconsistent paragraph breaks: 'O' appears as separate paragraph
issues.suggestion: Ensure proper paragraph structure during conversion

issues.description: The section heading 'THE FUNDAMENTALS: Why Tiny Changes Make a Big Difference' appears to have been duplicated and split: it renders once as a large combined heading at the top, then re-appears as two separate bold lines ('FUNDAMENTALS' and 'Why Tiny Changes Make a Big Difference') lower on the page. This duplication suggests a conversion artifact where part/chapter metadata was rendered both as a combined heading and as individual structural elements
issues.suggestion: Audit the heading extraction logic for part/chapter dividers; ensure part label and chapter title are not being emitted twice from separate CSS rules or structural tags

issues.description: The page contains only headings and no body text, leaving the majority of the page blank. While a chapter opener can begin on a new page, the duplication of heading content and the absence of any lead-in text suggests content was not properly flowed after the heading elements
issues.suggestion: Verify that the body content following this section opener is correctly linked and flowing into subsequent pages; check for broken spine or split-file issues in the EPUB structure

issues.description: The two repeated sub-headings ('FUNDAMENTALS' and 'Why Tiny Changes Make a Big Difference') are both bold and similar in size, providing no visual hierarchy differentiation between what should be a part label and a chapter title
issues.suggestion: Apply distinct font sizes and weights to part labels vs. chapter titles in the CSS stylesheet to establish clear visual hierarchy

issues.description: The repeated heading text is not garbled but its duplication constitutes a content integrity issue — the reader sees the same heading information three times in slightly different forms
issues.suggestion: De-duplicate heading emission in the conversion pipeline; one canonical heading element per structural unit should be output

issues.description: Minor text corruption: 'HE FATE OF' instead of 'THE FATE OF' at start of paragraph
issues.suggestion: Verify OCR accuracy for initial words

issues.description: Heading '1: The Surprising Power of Atomic Habits' appears twice, causing redundancy
issues.suggestion: Ensure heading structure is unique and properly formatted

issues.description: Text corruption: 'HY IS IT' instead of 'WHY IS IT' at start of paragraph
issues.suggestion: Correct OCR error in initial sentence

issues.description: Text corruption: 'W' appears as standalone character, likely a page break artifact
issues.suggestion: Check for proper paragraph handling at page boundaries

issues.description: Inconsistent paragraph breaks: 'W' appears as separate paragraph
issues.suggestion: Ensure proper paragraph structure during conversion

issues.description: Minor text duplication: 'How to Build Better Habits in 4 Simple Steps' appears twice at the top of the page.
issues.suggestion: Ensure consistent header formatting to avoid duplication.

issues.description: Heading 'THE 1ST LAW: Make It Obvious' is slightly misaligned and not perfectly centered.
issues.suggestion: Adjust horizontal alignment to ensure perfect centering of chapter titles.

issues.description: Heading '4: The Man Who Didn’t Look Right' is not visually distinct from the body text due to similar font size and weight.
issues.suggestion: Increase font size or weight of chapter headings to improve visual hierarchy.

issues.description: Heading '5: The Best Way to Start a New Habit' is not visually distinct from the body text due to similar font size and weight.
issues.suggestion: Increase font size or weight of chapter headings to improve visual hierarchy.

issues.description: Minor text duplication: '6: Motivation Is Overrated; Environment Often Matters More' appears twice at the top of the page.
issues.suggestion: Ensure consistent header formatting to avoid duplication.

issues.description: Heading '7: The Secret to Self-Control' is not visually distinct from the body text due to similar font size and weight.
issues.suggestion: Increase font size or weight of chapter headings to improve visual hierarchy.

issues.description: Heading 'THE 2ND LAW: Make It Attractive' is slightly misaligned and not perfectly centered.
issues.suggestion: Adjust horizontal alignment to ensure perfect centering of chapter titles.

issues.description: Heading '8: How to Make a Habit Irresistible' is not visually distinct from the body text due to similar font size and weight.
issues.suggestion: Increase font size or weight of chapter headings to improve visual hierarchy.

issues.description: Minor text artifacts: 'N 1965' appears as a line break instead of 'In 1965'.
issues.suggestion: Correct OCR parsing of date formatting to avoid line break artifacts.

issues.description: Minor text artifacts: 'N LATE 2012' appears as a line break instead of 'In late 2012'.
issues.suggestion: Correct OCR parsing of date formatting to avoid line break artifacts.

issues.description: Text formatting issue: HTML link tag 'atomic habits.com/cheatsheet' is visible in rendered text.
issues.suggestion: Remove or properly render HTML tags in text content.

issues.description: Heading hierarchy inconsistent: 'Inversion of the 2nd Law: Make It Unattractive' is styled as a main heading, but '2.4: Reframe your mind-set...' is styled as a subheading, creating confusion in hierarchy.
issues.suggestion: Standardize heading styles to reflect proper document structure.

issues.description: Minor inconsistency: 'THE 3RD LAW: Make It Easy' is in all caps, while 'Make It Easy' below is not, creating slight visual inconsistency.
issues.suggestion: Apply consistent capitalization and styling to headings.

summary: Evaluated 20 pages across 3 batch(es). Average page score: 84/100.
